column4: The reference frame or system from which linear or angular quantities are measured and assigned to the position that a point occupies
The minimum difference between two adjacent latitude values expressed in Geographic Coordinate Units of measure
The minimum difference between two adjacent longitude values expressed in Geographic Coordinate Units of measure
The unit of measure used for the latitude and longitude values
The parameters for the shape of the earth
The identification given to the reference system used for defining the coordinates of points
The identification given to established representations of the Earth's shape
The system of objects used to represent space in the Dataset
The raster spatial objects used to locate zero-, two-, or three-dimensional locations in the Dataset
The maximum number of raster objects along the ordinate (y) axis
The maximum number of raster objects along the abscissa (x) axis
The maximum number of raster objects along the vertical (z) axis
